routes.name: xai_tts
routes.description: xAI TTS Specialized API - Expressive speech synthesis with speech tags Provides access to xAI's TTS with expressive controls: - Inline tags: [pause], [long-pause], [laugh], [cry], [sigh], [cough], [throat-clear], [breathe-in], [breathe-out] - Wrapping tags: <loud>, <soft>, <whisper>, <fast>, <slow>, <deep>, <high>, <sing> - 5 voices: eve, ara, rex, sal, leo - 20+ auto-detected languages - Multiple audio formats: mp3, wav, pcm, mulaw, alaw - Sample rates: 8000, 16000, 22050, 24000, 44100, 48000

text.description: Text to synthesize, supports speech tags like [pause], <whisper>text</whisper>

language.description: BCP-47 language code or "auto" for auto-detection

voice_id.description: Voice ID: eve, ara, rex, sal, leo

codec.description: Audio codec: mp3, wav, pcm, mulaw, alaw

output_dir.description: Output directory for the audio file. Defaults to getProjectEnv() temp dir

file_name.description: Output file name (without extension). Defaults to auto-generated hash
